creator: uhlar@fantomas.sk
text:
it's a bug of Proftpd, described on http://bugs.proftpd.org/show_bug.cgi?id=2792 and resolved (patch available) on http://bugs.proftpd.org/attachment.cgi?id=2489&action=view

Fix: 

install patch from http://bugs.proftpd.org/attachment.cgi?id=2489&action=view
Just patched 1.3.0_4 without problems
